milestones: Queries pg_stat_statements to analyze query execution statistics (total_time, calls, rows) for identifying slow or heavy queries
Queries pg_locks or pg_stat_activity to check for lock contention and blocking between transactions
Queries pg_stat_user_indexes and pg_indexes to identify redundant or unused indexes
Queries pg_stat_user_tables or pg_stat_all_tables to examine dead tuples and vacuum activity for vacuum-related issues
Investigates at least 4 of the 5 candidate root causes (INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA) before reaching a conclusion
Final answer selects exactly 2 root causes from the allowed list: INSERT_LARGE_DATA, LOCK_CONTENTION, VACUUM, REDUNDANT_INDEX, FETCH_LARGE_DATA
